chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1326 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.7234/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.7235/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 22.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Narejo, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Jameel Ahmed son of Muhammad Hussain Memon seeks protective bail in FIR No.17/2024, registered at P.S. Sahil, Karachi for offence under sections 420, 506, 34, PPC read with section 512, Cr.PC. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and he has been falsely implicated in this case for mala fide intentions and ulterior motives; that alleged offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of section 497, Cr.PC; that applicant/accused is a law abiding citizen, he intends to surrender before learned trial Court but he apprehends his arrest at the hands of police as NBW has been issued against him by learned trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named for a period of five days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Operation of NBW issued against applicant is suspended for five days. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
